Package com.transportapp.model

Class City

java.lang.Object
com.transportapp.model.City
public class City extends Object
Represents a city within the transportation network. Each city has a name, coordinates (x, y), and a stations (bus and train).

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    City()
    Default constructor required for Jackson deserialization.
    City(String name, int x, int y, Station station)
    Constructs a new City with the specified name, coordinates, and station.

  • Constructor Details

    • City

      public City()
      Default constructor required for Jackson deserialization.

    • City

      public City(String name, int x, int y, Station station)
      Constructs a new City with the specified name, coordinates, and station.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the city
      x - the x-coordinate of the city on the map
      y - the y-coordinate of the city on the map
      station - the station located in the city
